caption: A woman with dark hair is captured in a medium shot, wearing a blue and white striped collared shirt and large black over-ear headphones. She is positioned in a room with a white wall behind her and a light-colored curtain to her left. To her right, a neutral-colored flat surface is partially visible. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the bottom left corner of the view. As the sequence progresses, the woman is speaking, her mouth opening and closing as she talks. Her facial expression shifts slightly, moving from a neutral gaze to a small smile and then a more focused expression. Her head remains relatively still, though there are minor movements in her posture and facial muscles as she continues to communicate.
